title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 158.58 resistance — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% — institutional long bias, watch for potential unwind on EUR/USD pullback.

title: AUD/USD Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/USD retail sentiment at 91% short — extreme short bias, watch for potential squeeze and AUD/USD rebound.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 17.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.20%.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break — JPY no longer acting as safe haven, watch for USD/JPY upside on risk-off.
